message:
feat(index): add WAL-aware soft delete, doc_id lookup index, and quantization cleanup

Extend the vector index with WAL-aware soft deletion to prevent stale
entries from polluting search results, add O(1) document position lookup,
and clean up quantization code style.

lib.rs (VectorIndex):
- Enhance soft_delete() to also remove entries from the Write-Ahead Log,
  not just marking main records as tombstones
- Add soft_delete_wal_entry() method that removes WAL entries for deleted
  doc_ids and rewrites the WAL file atomically
- Add rewrite_wal_sidecar() method with atomic rebuild and fallback
  handling for race conditions
- Add 2 tests: WAL-only record deletion with persistence across reopen,
  and clearing all pending WAL updates for a given doc_id

two_tier.rs:
- Add doc_id_to_fast_index HashMap for O(1) lookups of document positions
  in the fast tier (previously required linear scan)
- Add fast_index_for_doc_id() query method
- Build HashMap during initialization from loaded doc_ids
- Add test coverage for the new lookup method

quantization.rs:
- Convert vec![] to array literals where appropriate
- Simplify closures to method references (Vec::as_slice)
- Add clippy lint allows for cast_precision_loss

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
